qml-component.description: Generate an Angular standalone component from a QML file

qml-batch.description: Generate Angular standalone components from a directory of QML files

qml-feature.description: Generate an Angular feature from a QML bundle or qmlproject dependency graph

update-routes.description: Update generated route configuration for an Angular feature

migrate-generated.description: Migrate existing generated files to the current barrel and route conventions

validate-generated.description: Validate generated feature consistency against current workspace conventions
